top of page
Welcome to Pêche
(sounds like
Pesh)
Inspired by traditional flavors yet prepared with modern techniques, Pêche offers a fresh, creative, and respectful interpretation of the ocean & earth. We outsource only the best and freshest ingredients locally and from around the world.

meta.meta_description: Pêche, a modern seafood and raw bar showcases a knowledge of world flavors by using classical French cooking techniques to prepare every dish. Our team of highly trained chefs has curated a menu that not only concentrates on seafood but also on proteins and more. We also serve steaks, poultry, in-house freshly made pasta, pastries, desserts, and breads.
